caption:
Neon sweat trickled down my spine as I adjusted the holo-lace of my cyber-bikini. 🌊 The summer heat in Neo-Veridia was suffocating, but the adrenaline kept me cool. My contact was supposed to meet me at the rooftop of the Obsidian Spire, where the humidity clung to my skin like a second layer.

I watched the holographic waves crash against the digital skyline, my silver tech-chains rattling softly against the synthetic latex. He arrived in a sleek mag-lev sedan, tires hissing over the grated pavement. As he stepped out, the neon glow of a passing flyer cast a violet hue across my curves.

'You're early,' he murmured, voice distorted by an old cyber-modulator.

'And you're late,' I purred, letting my fingers trail down the exposed curve of my thigh. The smart-fabric of my suit shimmered, reacting to the heat and my body temp.

A drone buzzed overhead, scanning the perimeter. Security protocols were tight, but my neural link had already accepted the data key. We moved together, a silhouette against the glittering grid. The kiss was quick, a static charge of electricity between the two of us.

I leaned back against the railing, watching the holographic rain begin to fall. He pulled me close, the fabric of my bikini shifting to reveal the hidden tech beneath. The city hummed, waiting for us to disappear into its circuits.

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonDesires #SciFiErotica #RooftopVibes #FutureFashion #DigitalLove #CyberBabe #SummerNight #TechSeduction #InstaArt
